heading: Increase in income and employment in developing countries; enhancement of purchasing power; diversification away from single crop or product economies
label: 262n–1 Increase in income and employment in developing countries; enhancement of purchasing power; diversification away from single crop or product economies
notes: Codificationis based on section 701 of title VII of H.R. 3750, One Hundredth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Section 1402 of Pub. L. 95–118Pub. L. 100–202Dec. 11, 1987
DefinitionsThe definitions in apply to this section.section 262p–5 of this title

children.text: support activities which result in broad increases in income and employment and enhance purchasing power in developing countries, particularly among the rural poor; and

encourage diversification away from single crop or product economies in developing countries to help reduce wide fluctuations in commodity prices and the adverse impact of abrupt changes in the terms of trade.
